{{Infobox character
| name = Calder
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]]}}
| parents = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]], [[Alsa Grayweather|Alsa]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]], [[Read]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, use his mark to Read, predict, and destroy Elderspawn, [[Emperor’s Intent|Emperor's Intent]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Captain, Captain of The Testament, Emperor, [[Navigator]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, [[Imperial Steward]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, Navigators, [[Consultants]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Aurelian Empire]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|captain, duelist, [[Navigator]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, [[Imperial Steward]], Steward}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Calder Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Calder is an [[Izyrian]] man characterized by his red hair and significant skill as a [[Reader]]. Though he has previously been considered the most talented [[Reader]] in any room, he has encountered individuals with superior training and experience, second only to [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. He is a combatant who utilizes an orange-spotted [[sword]] and a [[cutlass]], and he has been known to wear the [[Emperor's armor]]. In certain instances, he has also attempted to disguise himself as a [[Navigator]] using a dark blue coat and a three-cornered hat adorned with [[Navigator]] crests. Throughout his experiences, Calder has navigated various roles and conflicts, including serving as a former [[Champion]]. He has been associated with the vessel known as the [[Shadow]] and has interacted with diverse figures such as [[Jyrine]], [[Urzaia]], and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. His history involves connections to [[Elders]], including a pet [[Elderspawn]], though he has expressed feelings of being manipulated by them. Calder has also been involved in confrontations within the [[Capital]] and near [[Candle Bay]], a location he describes as a former site of torture. His abilities include the use of [[Intent]] and [[Reader senses]] to navigate dangerous situations, such as combat or detecting immediate threats.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder Marten]], the son of [[Rojric]] and [[Alsa]], is a [[Reader]] and [[Soulbound]] who operates under the alias of an ancient craftsman. As the captain of [[The Testament]], he is a highly trained duelist and a man capable of focusing his [[Intent]], though he struggles with navigation. During his journey, Calder interacts with the [[Imperial Guard]] and [[Foster]] following a previous arrest and trial, eventually making a bargain with [[Kelarac]] that leaves him wearing the mark of the entity. He utilizes his blood to bind his [[Intent]] to a raft and to help create his ship, which he plans to guide using an [[Elder]] creature from the [[Aion]]. While navigating the seas, Calder observes a crater and eventually spots red sails and alchemical flames upon the ocean.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">53</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the son of [[Rojric]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]'s alias is an ancient craftsman.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the protagonist of the chapter.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has past experience with [[Witnesses]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the person who pointed toward his [[Quartermaster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] gripped a [[cutlass]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the son of [[Alsa]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a captain.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is married to [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses a [[pistol]] and a [[cutlass]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who can focus his [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] leaned forward scenting weakness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a captain who is not a very good navigator.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the [[Captain]] of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has been living with his mother for more than a year.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who carries [[steel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]'s full name is [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses a saber.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is shaking and trembling.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a person who has heard of the [[Blackwatch Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who observes the crater and its contents.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] was running back to the edge of a crater.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who can sense despair radiating from others.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] reminded himself that he belongs there.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who was previously involved in a trial and an arrest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who interacts with the [[Imperial Guard]] and [[Foster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a highly trained duelist.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] carries a saber in his right hand and a [[pistol]] in his left.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] jumps onto a ship's railing and launches himself into the air.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] winced in anticipation of landing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is planning to use an [[Elder]] creature from the [[Aion]] to guide a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wears a [[Blackwatch coat]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] used his blood to bind his [[Intent]] to the boards of his raft.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has seven nails.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is wearing [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s crown.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has a link to a [[Bellowing Horror]], a [[Lyathatan]], and the [[Soul Collector]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] made a bargain with [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]'s father is in prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] can [[Read]] a living human being's [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] emerged from a concealed tunnel entrance leading to the dungeons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who visited [[Lucan's cell]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is waiting inside a hollow boulder.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] used his blood to help create the ship [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]'s mother helped plan the ship [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] threw the [[Heart of the Dead Mother]] into the ocean.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wears the mark of [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] possesses a weapon that can sigh contentedly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a character who has a pain in his leg.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] arrived at the prisons just as the ground caved in.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] spotted the red sails and bright alchemical flames on the ocean.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] was incapacitated by a needle in his arm.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] is part of a crew that arrived at the crater.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] is kneeling by [[Urzaia]] instead of seeking shelter.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] possesses a pet [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|After being released unharmed, the flame-colored haired Calder assisted in the construction of his ship, [[The Testament]]. While navigating toward the [[Capital]] and avoiding harbor-guns, he suffered from a pounding head before being startled by [[General Teach]]. Dressed in [[Imperial]] clothing, [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] and [[Imperial Steward]] attended a meeting with Maxeus and [[Teach]] in the courtyard outside the [[Emperor's quarters]]. Following an interrogation of [[Urzaia]], Calder awoke aboard his ship suffering from [[Reader]]'s burn and later underwent medical recovery in a copper bathtub filled with noxious green sludge. During an escape attempt, he gathered his men even as [[The Testament]] was stopped by the [[Lyathatan's chains]]. While steering the ship and using [[Intent]] to [[Read]] the [[Lyathatan]], he observed a battle through a [[spyglass]] before being mysteriously transported to a towering [[library]]. Ultimately, Calder was expelled from the [[Blackwatch]] and banished to the [[Navigators]] after his father was executed.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">38</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has been released unharmed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] participated in the construction of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a character who wondered how to approach the [[Capital]] without alerting harbor-guns.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is experiencing a pounding head from previous exertions.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a person who was startled to hear [[General Teach]] address him.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] remained on the deck.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was in the courtyard outside the [[Emperor's quarters]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was wearing [[Imperial]] clothing.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was present during the meeting with Maxeus and [[Teach]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is interrogating [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a [[Captain]] who intends to return for [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is observing the defeat of an [[Elder wall]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] woke up aboard [[The Testament]] and experienced [[Reader]]'s burn.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] wears a red-and-gold jacket.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder's ship]] is named [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder's ship]], [[The Testament]], has no power to give him.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is an [[Imperial Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is soaking in a copper bathtub filled with noxious green sludge for medical recovery.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] says [[Shera]] survived.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a person who is currently trying to figure out a way to escape.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] gathered the men during an escape.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder's ship]] was stopped by the [[Lyathatan's chains]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has bright flame-colored hair.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] felt ashamed of his [[Izyrian]] ancestors who built the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] holds the rank of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] and [[Imperial Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] carries a [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is planning to free [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was in danger of being crushed by panicked people seeking escape.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is the one steering [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] uses [[Intent]] to [[Read]] the [[Lyathatan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] observed the battle through a [[spyglass]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] stood on the [[Gray Island]] docks during the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was mysteriously transported to a towering [[library]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was expelled from the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] was banished to the [[Navigators]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]]'s father was executed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] recognized the type of ship used by the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] can stop the [[Consultants]] with a word.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] is pursuing [[Shera]] personally now that the [[Veil]] is lifted.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] and nominal head of his faction, Calder serves as a [[Steward]] who possesses the ability to use his mark to read and destroy [[Elderspawn]]. During negotiations involving [[Estyr Six]], he experienced a paralysis of thought caused by overwhelming [[Intent]], though he later learned to use the [[Emperor's crown]] to reinforce his own power. While participating in discussions behind a barricade, Calder planned to act as bait for the [[Consultants]] and eventually donned [[Emperor's armor]] to oversee a crowd of ten thousand people. After steering the [[Lyathatan]] with [[Intent]], Calder suffered a fatal sucking wound to his back and died in a [[Capital mansion]]. Following this, he experienced a transformation where his body became a vessel for [[Kelarac]] and was eventually enhanced by [[Petal]] into a new form. Ultimately, Calder sat upon the throne of the [[Aurelian Empire]] as the second human to do so, sharing a body with [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">71</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has an [[Elder]] chained to his ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] bartered with [[Kelarac]] for the [[sword]] he wears.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can use his mark to [[Read]], predict, and destroy [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jyrine]] is [[Calder]]'s girlfriend.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is the nominal head of his faction.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a character who is in debt.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] considered wearing the [[Emperor's armor]] but chose not to.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is participating in a negotiation involving [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s thoughts were paralyzed by overwhelming [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can use the crown to reinforce his [[Intent]] with [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] uses [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] commands the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s mind shut down due to being overwhelmed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is using the [[Optasia]] to absorb information.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] decides to gaze into the [[void]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a character present in the discussion behind the barricade.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is sleeping in the tower.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is especially sensitive to [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has learned something that could cause the [[Great Elders]] to destroy him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] led the others to barricade a far wall.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a [[Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] intends to present himself as bait to give the [[Consultants]] an opportunity.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can feel the authority in the [[Emperor's crown]] through the metal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is standing on a balcony with [[Imperial Guards]] and looking out over a crowd of ten thousand people.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] possesses an ember-spotted blade.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] carries [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s crown in a concealed pocket beneath his armor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] wears [[Emperor's armor]] with a visor containing [[Intent]] that enhances sight.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] wields an [[Awakened sword]] that emits orange light.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] observed [[Shera]] through the mist.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s thoughts turned to [[Jerri]] as darkness closed in on him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] uses [[Intent]] to steer the [[Lyathatan]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] walked away with his crew intact while [[Tommison]] and his crew died under mysterious [[Elder]]-related circumstances.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] strapped a chest containing the crown to the [[Lyathatan]]’s manacles.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has died.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has not fully succeeded [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a person [[Dalton Foster]] might look for.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s [[life]] is in danger.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a sucking wound to his back.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is in a sitting room of an expensive [[Capital mansion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is shown wearing armor and a tall, spiked crown of yellowed bone in a vision.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A ninety-foot golden statue of [[Calder]] stands guard over his massive tomb.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is questioning why the [[Head of the Consultant’s Guild]] helped remove his armor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is working with [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is experiencing extreme physical pain and sensation of lightning in his bones.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] was restrained with cheap tin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a shattered chain dangling from his wrist.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is currently unable to walk without a crutch.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s body was the vessel for [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a plan of his own.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is not a real [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] has favored [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] refused [[Kelarac]]'s offer to save him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is the former [[Steward]] of the entire [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] planned to use an artifact left by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to get even with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has earned fame by facing [[Great Elders]] down directly.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] carries [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] from his armor and crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can communicate messages using his [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has had his body enhanced by [[Petal]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a new body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is experiencing vision loss and difficulty breathing.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is aware that the others do not know they are living on borrowed time.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] possesses [[Calder's Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is alone on a deck with [[Jerri]] and [[Elder worms]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s [[Vessel]] is a ship named [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is a character who received an [[Awakened sword]] from [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] felt sorry that he let [[Lucan]] die.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] sat on the throne of the [[Aurelian Empire]] as the second human being to do so.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] woke in the same body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] expressed a desire to keep [[Calder]] and the crew as toys.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Once known as the false Emperor, Calder has worn the old clothes and armor of the true ruler. During his time on the [[Gray Island]], he faced the [[Handmaiden]] and encountered the [[Great Elders]], receiving a mark from one of them while sustaining a reddish burn scar on his arm. As an armored man equipped with a black glass visor, he wielded a [[sword]] that shone orange beneath silver clouds and delivered a speech at [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s Stage. Following a desperate charge at [[Kelarac]], he was left wounded, exhausted, and burned across his body on the deck. He now observes the [[Dead Mother]] as she walks.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] may wear the [[Emperor’s old clothes]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] has faced down the [[Handmaiden]] on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] has seen the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] has a reddish burn scar on his arm.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] received a mark from an [[Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]]'s wife is one of the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] was in a room wearing the [[Emperor's armor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder's sword]] shines orange in the silver clouds.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] wears a black glass visor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] is an armored man.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] was the false Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] gave a speech at [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s Stage.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] rushed at [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] was wounded, exhausted, and burned all over on the deck.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] is watching the [[Dead Mother]] walk.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“You’re carrying steel. You know how to use it?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"I’m actually a highly trained duelist, Petal."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Calder has been released unharmed, and soon we will return to the ship.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Urzaia. I can’t do anything now, but I will come back for you.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“First, why would the Head of the Consultant’s Guild personally help remove my armor?<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
